---
name: TCK Challenge
about: Create a TCK Challenge
title: 'Challenges for TCK tests written specifically for Persistence SPEC requirements belong here'
labels: 'challenge'
assignees: ''
---

**Follow the TCK Process document**
Please follow the instructions in the TCK Process document (https://jakarta.ee/committees/specification/tckprocess).


** The TCK Challenge MUST include:**
1. The relevant specification version and section number(s).
2. The challenged tests with the fully qualified classnames and then the test methods, e.g. ee.jakarta.tck.persistence.core.callback.added.Client#persistTest
3. The exact TCK version.
4. The implementation being tested.
5. A full description of why the test is invalid and what the correct behavior is believed to be.
6. Any supporting material; debug logs, test output (.jtr file), test logs, run scripts, etc.


**Description**
A clear and concise description of why you think the tests are wrong.
For an example of an existing Persistence TCK challenge, see https://github.com/jakartaee/persistence/issues/391


**Additional context**
Add any other context about the challenge here.
